headline: Dow Jones Futures: Stock Market Hits Highs On U.S.-Iran Deal; Dell Surges On Earnings
summary: The stock market rose to fresh highs Thursday on a reported interim U.S.-Iran deal. Dell soared overnight on earnings.

headline: Berkshire Hathaway Is Underperforming, but 4 of Warren Buffett’s Top Picks Are Up Big This Year
summary: Warren Buffett stepped down as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway on December 31, 2025, after six decades leading the conglomerate he transformed from a struggling textile mill into a $1 trillion empire. The “Oracle of Omaha” left his successor, Greg Abel, with a very concentrated portfolio: more than 65% of Berkshire’s $381 billion portfolio is invested ... Berkshire Hathaway Is Underperforming, but 4 of Warren Buffett’s Top Picks Are Up Big This Year

headline: Monster Beverage Announces Participation in dbAccess Global Consumer Conference 2026
summary: CORONA, Calif., May 28, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Monster Beverage Corporation (NASDAQ: MNST) announced today that members of its senior management team will participate in a fireside chat at the dbAccess Global Consumer Conference on Thursday, June 4, 2026 at 9:15 a.m. CEST/3:15 a.m. ET. The fireside chat will be open to all interested parties as a live webcast at www.monsterbevcorp.com, under the “Events & Presentations” section. Monster Beverage CorporationBased in Corona, California, Monster
